case_title: REYES, DORA VS SOLIS, VIRGINIA M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY REYES, DORA AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, VIRGINIA M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, DORA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOLIS, VIRGINIA M. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
